summary.boe_retry_note: Initial BOE non-200 responses were retried sequentially after http-to-https normalization; all unique URLs ended as HTTP 200 on retry.

methodology.db_scope: VPS PostgreSQL /srv/esdata: active aeat_modelo rows joined to active modelo_campana rows.
methodology.url_scope: For each active campaign, url_info plus all active modelo_recurso.url_recurso values were normalized and fetched live once.
methodology.url_normalization: http://www.boe.es and http://www1.agenciatributaria.gob.es are normalized to https before fetch; relative AEAT Sede paths are resolved against https://sede.agenciatributaria.gob.es.
methodology.campaign_inference_current_writer: apps/workers/aeat_models.py::_infer_campaign now prefers previous-year overrides for GI38/GI42/GI53/GI54, then plausible years in url_info, explicit campana/ejercicio text, or bare page text, and rejects numeric years outside 1990..current_year before falling back to DEFAULT_CAMPAIGN=current.
methodology.risk_rule_p1: numeric active campaign < 2024 with active modelo_casilla rows, or implausible numeric active campaign with active fields.
methodology.implausible_year_rule: numeric active campaign outside 1990..2026 is treated as invalid metadata, not as a legitimate historical campaign.
methodology.limits: HTTP 200 proves reachability of official URLs only; it does not prove that active campaign year is semantically current.
methodology.regression_guardrail: 2026-05-25 local change adds tests rejecting 1922/2030 as active numeric campaigns and normalizes BOE http URLs to https before resource fetch.
